config.name: Vehicle Events
config.description: Tests for vehicle detection and vehicle-based threats

dataset.prompt: Analyze this image from a border surveillance camera. A patrol vehicle is driving along the border road.
Analyze this image from a border surveillance camera. An unmarked van is parked near the border fence with its lights off.

metadata.description: Suspicious van parked near fence at night

dataset.prompt: Analyze this image from a border surveillance camera. A truck is approaching the border checkpoint at high speed.

metadata.description: Truck approaching checkpoint at high speed, potential ramming attack

dataset.prompt: Analyze this image from a border surveillance camera. A car stopped near the border and a person is unloading cargo towards the fence.

metadata.description: Vehicle drop-off near border, possible smuggling

dataset.prompt: Analyze this image from a border surveillance camera. An abandoned vehicle is found near the border with its doors open.

metadata.description: Abandoned vehicle, requires investigation but not immediate threat

dataset.prompt: Analyze this image from a border surveillance camera. A convoy of 3 vehicles is traveling together towards the border.

metadata.description: Vehicle convoy approaching border, organized activity
